title: Crunchy Flaky Flatbread with Rye Crust
description: A crispy flatbread with a crunchy rye crust, perfect for snacking. This recipe is inspired by the simplicity of traditional Chinese flatbreads.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine rye flour, all-purpose flour, and flaky sea salt.
Gradually add water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Roll out the dough to 1/4 inch thickness and cut into 4 equal pieces.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet and brush with sesame oil.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve with norwegian feta cheese, if desired.
